canonical_answer: A person wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt with striped cuffs manipulates pink and white fluffy wool fibers over a dark brown wooden table. A yellow rectangular foam block sits on the surface with a thin metal needle inserted vertically into it. A dark blue ceramic mug rests on the left side of the table near the workspace. The person stretches and holds the fibrous material with both hands throughout the sequence.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A dark brown wooden table surface supports a yellow rectangular sponge block with a vertical metal needle inserted into it. A person wearing a yellow garment with brown striped cuffs handles pink and white wool roving near the needle. A dark blue ceramic mug remains visible on the left side of the workspace. The individual pulls and stretches the fibrous materials while working around the stationary foam block.

question: Describe the sequence of actions and objects introduced during the crafting process shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a person pulls white fibrous material apart with hands; at 10s, a dark blue ceramic mug appears on the table surface; at 14s, a thin metal needle is stuck vertically into a yellow foam block; at 18s, the person holds pink fluffy material instead of white fiber.

question: Walk through the changes in tools and materials visible on the workspace throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a yellow rectangular block is visible in the background behind the hands; at 10s, a yellow sponge sits on the table beneath the hands; at 14s, a needle is stuck vertically into a yellow block of foam; at 18s, a white fluffy object sits on the table near the sponge.
